description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that compiles XCSoar for Android. The workflow should trigger on workflow dispatch, push to master branch (excluding certain paths), and pull requests to master (excluding certain paths). It should use an ubuntu-latest job to set environment variables based on the event type, checkout the repository with submodules, cache ccache, find the Git hash, and then compile XCSoar using a Docker image. The workflow should also upload the compiled artifact and deploy it to a staging server via SSH.
